final:
module RefModule(
    input a,
    input b,
    input sel_b1,
    input sel_b2,
    output wire out_assign,
    wire __out_assign_tmp = (sel_b1&sel_b2)?b:a;
    assign out_assign = __out_assign_tmp;
    
    always@(*) begin
        if (sel_b1&sel_b2) begin
            out_always = b;
        end
        else begin
            out_always = a;
        end
    end
endmodule
